Subscription.Description: TFG - Reenvio de eventos de Sysmon y Security (4625) desde los clientes del dominio al servidor central.
Subscription.Query: <QueryList> <Query Id="0" Path="Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational"> <Select Path="Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational">*</Select> </Query> <Query Id="1" Path="Security"> <Select Path="Security">*[System[(EventID=4625)]]</Select> </Query> <Query Id="2" Path="Microsoft-Windows-Windows Defender/Operational"> <Select Path="Microsoft-Windows-Windows Defender/Operational">*[System[(EventID=1006 or EventID=1007 or EventID=1015 or EventID=1116 or EventID=1117 or EventID=1118 or EventID=1119 or EventID=5001 or EventID=5007)]]</Select> </Query> </QueryList>
